/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/llama-simple-chat.dir/simple-chat.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-simple-chat  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ander.alvarez/dev/perso/turboquant-cpu/llama.cpp/build-arm-turboquant/bin ../../bin/libllama.0.0.6.dylib ../../bin/libggml.0.9.5.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.9.5.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.5.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.9.5.dylib
